assets.qc_summary: Pass: final board reads as an upright Blackwolf snowline scout and peripheral liaison rather than a human with wolf ears, noble deer character, heavy siege troop, or mascot. It preserves three-state continuity, wolf muzzle, black ears, golden vertical pupils, low black-grey tail, wolf facial tattooing, dark-blue snow-runner clothing, leather forearm and knee guards, bone whistle, short bow, three short javelins, snow claw footgear, and dark-silver wolf-tooth object language. The locked Wanshou emblem is not redesigned; northern symbol language remains object/material-based. Note for downstream prompts: keep the pelt short and scout-specific, not a heavy mantle.
